programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Tails invents a Hover-Hanglider for Sonic's birthday, Sonic suggests he assist Prof. Von Schlemmer with his new Robotnik-Nabber machine. Robotnik hears about this, and poses as Von Schlemmer to trick Tails into inventing a Sonic-Nabber instead.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik decides to cripple Mobius' three major transit systems: Rail, Air, and Sea in order to fully gain control of the planet. Sonic has to circumnavigate the planet in order to save the day.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a robot coach -- the "Coachnik", to put S and G through a "Training Camp" to improve their skills. Then Coachnik puts a bomb in Grounder's head as a booby trap for Sonic, and a football game ensues with Grounder's head as the ball.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help out an Owl/Chilidog Diner owner when Robotnik uses his henchbots to collect money.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts inadvertantly creates a "super power" formula, when his janitor bucket spills in the lab. Robotnik falls into it and becomes "Super Robotnik", then challenges Sonic to a fight, with all of Mobius as the stakes. With Prof. Von...

programme.title: Sonic Christmas Blast
programme.desc: Santa Claus has made an announcement - he is retiring and has picked the perfect successor - "Robotnikclaus"! Sonic and his sister resolve to persuade Santa to return and set Christmas straight. When the two track down the Santa who made the announcement, they discover he is just a phony robot and the real Santa Claus is being held prisoner.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part I
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.desc: Everyone in the island receives a mysterious letter. Donkey Kong and Diddy discovers that Kongo Bongo Island is coming to an end which these letters contain a curse that causes the Crystal Coconut to stop working, and could eventually destroy the island.

programme.title: SONIC X Techno-Teacher
programme.desc: Eggman tries to use his robot "Intellihente" to brainwash Chris' class but when it winds up teaching more than brainwashing, Eggman steps in to put the children in permanent detention until a worried Sonic arrives, destroys the robot and saves the class.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends meet a Pokémon researcher who wants to see a unique Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash challenges Gym Leader Lt. Surge, but Pikachu's opponent is a strong Raichu.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Team Rocket lures Ash and friends onto a cruise ship to steal their Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes are forced to work with Team Rocket in order to survive a shipwreck.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Pikachu and the other Pokémon get separated from their Trainers on an island.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A group of wild Tentacool disrupt the development of a resort hotel.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In a seaside town, a terrifying ghost story comes to life for Brock and James.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has a tough decision to make after encountering a group of wild Butterfree.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Aiming for his fourth badge, Ash challenges Saffron City Gym Leader Sabrina.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After losing to Sabrina, Ash visits Lavender Town to catch a Ghost-type Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Leaving Lavender Town with a Haunter in tow, Ash sets his sights on a rematch.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash tries to catch a wild Mankey, it loses its cool and steals his hat.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash gets kicked out of the Celadon City Gym as he's about to challenge Erika.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Young children are going missing in HopHopHop Town—could a Pokémon be involved?

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Former CIA spy takes on his toughest assignment to date: looking after his girlfriend's three kids.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Christmas Thieves
programme.desc: After two kids mistake burglars for babysitters, the thieves have to endure the children's hijinks as they make various absurd attempts to escape.

programme.title: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: After unexpectedly moving to Alaska, an ambitious doctor starts a new romance and learns that her small town is hiding a holiday secret.

programme.title: Santa Claws
programme.desc: Tommy leaves his kittens out for Santa to take back to the North Pole, but after a major allergic reaction Santa can't deliver presents anymore, so the kittens have to deliver the rest of the presents to all the boys and girls.

programme.title: The Christmas Candle
programme.desc: A heart-warming Christmas tale based on a best-selling novel. Deep in the heart of the English countryside lies the enchanting village of Gladbury. Legend has it every 25 years an angel touches a single candle, and whomever lights this candle receives a miracle on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: A Christmas Promise
programme.desc: Uptight city accountant Michael Thompson is hired to help a family save their stable before the bank shuts them down. Michael reluctantly agrees, but as he searches for ways to save a family's legacy, he finds something he never expected.

programme.title: Two Wrongs
programme.desc: A single mother must do the unthinkable to find her abducted daughter. Starring Gillian Zinser (2015)

programme.title: Run To Me
programme.desc: An amateur triathlete falls under the spell of a controversial trainer who utilizes experimental hypnotherapy. Starring Claire Forlani (2016)

programme.title: Early Release
programme.desc: A suburban mother must protect her family from her former prison cellmate. Starring Kelli Williams (2017)

programme.title: Brace For Impact
programme.desc: (2016) Drama with Kerry Condon. A disgraced Flight Crash Investigator uncovers a conspiracy while probing her brother's mysterious plane crash. Can she race to uncover the truth?

programme.title: Dispatch
programme.desc: (2016) Crime thriller with Fiona Gubelmann. A 911 operator takes a call from a child and dismisses it as a prank. But when a body is discovered, she'll do whatever it takes to make things right...

programme.title: Dan In Real Life
programme.desc: In this down-to-earth dramedy, a widowed advice columnist and single father (Steve Carell) falls in love with a woman (Juliette Binoche) only to discover she is dating his brother.

programme.title: Girl Most Likely
programme.desc: Kristen Wiig stars as Imogene, once a promising young New York playwright whose promise has fizzled, thanks to a crisis of confidence. Heavily in denial about being dumped by her society boyfriend, Imogene uses her skill for drama to stage an elaborate fake suicide as an appeal for his sympathy.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Nicole Kidman and Colin Firth star in this stirring drama about the friendship between Thomas Wolfe and editor Maxwell Perkins (who discovered F. Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway).

programme.title: Love Always, Santa
programme.desc: A young girl, whose mother is a widow, sends a note to Santa, wishing her mom could find love once more. The letter ends up in the hands of a writer who's dealing with some writer's block. Reading it sparks his creativity and maybe the start of a love story.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda harus menghentikan Tuan Kegelapan dari menghancurkan siang dan menikahi wanita yang dicintainya.

programme.title: An En Vogue Christmas
programme.desc: The Opera House is closing, and in order to save it. The owners daughter gets the group En Vouge to reunite and do a Christmas performance at the place that gave them their start.

programme.title: Married by Christmas
programme.desc: A high-level executive must find herself a husband before Christmas in order to inherit a fortune.

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem. When he gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play and it's all or nothing. Based on the novel by Academy Award-winning writer William Goldman.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: Luke Wright is tormented by the Russian Mafia and witnesses a young Chinese girl being pursued by the same mafia who want her for a priceless numerical code that they would kill for.

programme.title: Christmas Ransom
programme.desc: In this festive comedy for the whole family, a pair of bumbling crooks break into a toy store on the verge of closing, and take the struggling owner hostage. Little do they know that two hideaway kids have also been locked in the store. With Christmas on the line, the kids team up with a heavily pregnant security officer in a series of hilarious and heartwarming escapades. Can they outwit the thieves and save both the store, and Christmas?

programme.title: My First Miracle
programme.desc: This is the story of Angelica, a 16 year-old girl who's battling a rare kind of cancer called Myelodysplastic Syndrome, her struggles to try to live a normal life, and her hopes of finding her first true love before it's too late.

programme.title: Christmas Couple's Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples attend a retreat to strengthen their respective relationships under the guidance of a famed therapist. But as the holiday season unfolds, unexpected challenges arise when the therapist must confront some feelings of her own, and sparks fly when one couple's son unexpectedly falls for the charming retreat manager. Will this festive getaway reignite these couples' love, or will it lead them down an entirely new path?

programme.title: Christmas Miracle (2014)
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in the sleepy town of Rockford when Sheriff Rick Langston (Dean Cain, Lois & Clarke: The New Adventures of Superman) arrests a mysterious man who resembles Santa Claus. However, when the townspeople's Christmas wishes all start to come true, the sheriff begins to wonder if this jolly old man just might be the real deal. It is when he is out of love and luck and at his most cynical that the sheriff meets Lucy (Christine Lakin, Valentine\s Day) and is shown the miracle of love and family. As Christmas Day fast approaches, new relationships are forged and existing ties are strengthened in this uplifting festival story for the whole family.

programme.title: Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Recently widowed, Julia (Olivia Newton-John) is left to raise two young girls on her own, and when she loses her job, things go from bad to worse as she struggles to pay her bills. Then, arriving at her idyllic mountain home, city banker Brian Harding (Gregory Harrison) is tasked to deliver some devastating news - she'll need to hand over the property after Christmas. However, an unlikely relationship begins when Brian crashes his car nearby, and Julia graciously offers for him to stay with her over the holidays while he heals up and waits out the snowstorm. Eventually won over by the love and determination of the small family, might Brian find a way to bring them a Christmas miracle?

programme.title: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Based on shocking true events in the wake of the 9/11 terror attacks this thought-provoking political thriller stars James Marsden, Woody Harrelson, Jessica Biel and Tommy Lee Jones. Journalists Jonathan and Warren are covering George Bush's 2003 invasion of Iraq but become sceptical that Saddam Hussein was hiding "weapons of mass destruction", so challenge the White House. A race against time!

programme.title: Robin Hood: The Rebellion
programme.desc: The Raid meets Die Hard with a medieval twist, in this fast and furious new take on the legend of Robin Hood featuring the stars of Game of Thrones, Vikings and Torchwood. When Maid Marian is kidnapped by the Sheriff of Nottingham, Robin Hood must get a band of men together to save her. An audacious plan is set to penetrate the depths of the Sheriff's castle to defeat the bloodthirsty tyrant.

programme.title: The Wolf Hour
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat psychological thriller starring Academy Award nominee Naomi Watts. July 1977. New York is awash with escalating violence. June, once a celebrated counterculture figure, has shut herself inside her grandmother's South Bronx apartment. But her doorbell is ringing incessantly, the heat is unbearable and creeping paranoia take hold and June must determine whom she can trust.

programme.title: Awkward Sexy People
programme.desc: Jeff and Anne, two close friends and co-workers in a suburban high school, are embarrassingly unlucky at love. With nothing else to lose, they hatch a plan to transform themselves over the course of a sex-and-alcohol-fueled summer into the cool, confident people they aspire to be. At first an exhilarating adventure of self-discovery, Jeff and Anne's journey turns into a laugh-out-loud experiment as they lose their identities, their dignity, and quite possibly each other.

programme.title: Man Down
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf (Fury), Gary Oldman (The Dark Knight), Jai Courtney (Suicide Squad) and Kate Mara (House of Cards) headline this gripping, post-apocalyptic thriller. Home bound from Afghanistan, Gabriel a hard-nosed US marine, whose instinct is to shoot first and ask questions later, desperately searches for his estranged family. This pulse-pounding story delivers a hard hitting message!

programme.title: All Things Valentine
programme.desc: (2016) Heartfelt headlines with Sarah Rafferty. A columnist is ready to put her pen down when it comes to romance, but will the arrival of a dashing veterinarian put the bite back into her love life?

programme.title: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: (2016) Rom-com starring Meghan Markle. Successful in business but unlucky in love, at the advice of relationship expert Dr. Susie, Cass cautiously consults the 'dater's handbook.'

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: TV presenter Tiffany reluctantly gives divorcee Brooks a lifestyle makeover for her new show. Can Brooks's charm help raise the show's ratings, or will he raise Tiffany's heart instead? (2020)

programme.title: Love, Take Two
programme.desc: TV producer Lily returns to her College town to film a wedding show. To Lily's surprise ex-beau Scott is the groom. Did fate bring these two back together? (2019)

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: (2020) Romance with Gabrielle Christian. Rosie has to sell her Grandma's vintage shop but a run in with her school crush shows her it isn't the only thing worth a second chance.

programme.title: Christmas Coupon
programme.desc: Alison begins teaching ice skating students on a friend's frozen pond. On the first day of an ice skating class, Alison's old high school sweetheart Ivan, and now famous hockey player unexpectedly shows up when he brings his niece for her skating lessons.

programme.title: The Beauty Of Love
programme.desc: Emma has a lifestyle website that she puts her heart and soul into called “Classically Emma”. But when her numbers start trending down, she thinks she might've found her fix in a partnership with an ambitious millennial named Jill who has her own dreams.

programme.title: A Taste of Love
programme.desc: A struggling TV chef returns home to find that her family's restaurant is for sale, not able to compete with contemporary cuisine. Trying to save it, she reconnects with her childhood sweetheart and finds the inspiration she was seeking.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: When Seattle interior designer Lily Summers returns to her hometown to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast, she meets Marcus, the handsome seaplane pilot whose life's work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Falling in Love at Christmas
programme.desc: Miranda and Paul, two rivals, meet on a costumed Santa crawl and spend a romantic evening together without learning each other's identities. As their anonymous romance continues online, their businesses merge, forcing them into an unwanted partnership.

programme.title: 12 Days of Giving
programme.desc: When Baxter decides to become a Secret Santa to the people in his hometown and the joy of giving at Christmas spreads across town. Along the way, he forms a close friendship with Pamela and her son Westin. But there's one problem, he's already engaged!

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story. Ten-year-old Wesley puts together a "Secret Santa" gift for a needy child and when ten-year-old Megan opens the package, she discovers an item that will have a huge impact on her life to come.

programme.title: The Last Straw
programme.desc: During the Christmas season, a mom grows tired of her children's constant bickering. To get everyone into the holiday spirit, she lets them help build a nest for Baby Jesus one piece of straw at a time when they do something nice.

programme.title: Destined at Christmas 2
programme.desc: A year after Theo and Kim first met, Theo is eager to marry Kim. He picks up a ring to propose, but is sidetracked by Kim's news of a great development at her work. With the Christmas rush of shopping and traditions, Theo tries again and again to propose, but something gets in the way each time, even losing the engagement ring. Kim can tell something is wrong, but not the reason, and it has both her and Theo trying to figure out what the other wants in their relationship.

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: After historic love letters start anonymously appearing in Kallie Sharp's mailbox, the hobby farmer searches for her secret admirer and opens herself up to love.

programme.title: All We Need For Christmas
programme.desc: For the Sullivan family, the Christmas season is anything but jolly as they prepare for their first holiday following the loss of their wife and mother. But everything changes one winter night when an unexpected visitor arrives at the Sullivan's door seeking shelter and offering a much-needed gift: hope

programme.title: Hot Chocolate Holiday
programme.desc: Colette runs a coffee shop that is home to her secret and famous hot chocolate recipe. She finds herself in competition with Marcus, the kind, new dessert shop owner who draws her customers away with his own specialty hot chocolate. Colette thinks he stole her recipe but she gives him a chance when his store suffers damage from a fire and has to close. Colette works together with him to repair his shop but it might not be enough to get him back on his feet in time for Christmas. It will, however, help Colette see Marcus in a different light, especially as she learns the source of his hot chocolate recipe. Love, hot chocolate and an unexpected connection will bring Marcus and Colette together for the holidays.

programme.title: Mistletoe Mixup
programme.desc: A workaholic with no time for romance, or the holidays ends up meeting two potential suitors on the same day, but unbeknownst to her, they turn out to be brothers. A sibling squabble commences in this holiday romance.

programme.title: A Gift Wrapped Christmas
programme.desc: Personal shopper Gwen's new client Charlie is a workaholic.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe (Arielle Kebbel) is hired to plan the local Christmas Festival.

programme.title: A Family for the Holidays
programme.desc: Becky decides invite Grace to join her family for Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: A Gift Wrapped Christmas
programme.desc: Personal shopper Gwen's new client Charlie is a workaholic.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: When a teen aspiring to be a pop star disappears, her mom tracks her down, uncovering a sinister plot.

programme.title: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: A PR maven takes pride in her reputation, but she risks it to help a star accused of killing his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Love Club: Sydney
programme.desc: When Sydney reconnects with her ex and joins a Half Marathon he is running, she asks the Love Club to help.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, to take her to the senior prom, little did she know that 15 years later she'd be married, have two daughters and tons of debt. When Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker, Paula wishes her decision were different. With bills and troubles mounting, especially frustrating during the Christmas season, Paula wishes hard to trade places with Nick's wife. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick. But, be careful what you wish for… Although she is financially rich, she is far from happy. Eventually her “dream” becomes a “nightmare,” as Nick wants a divorce and she can't find a way back to Gary and her daughters. Will there be a Merry Christmas?

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Star
programme.desc: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the first Christmas.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A newly-divorced mom has some unexpected adventures the night before Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas On The Vine
programme.desc: Brooke (Julianna Guill), a young marketing executive, goes back to her hometown excited to relive her Christmas memories, while helping a struggling family-owned winery.

programme.title: Little Big Horn
programme.desc: In 1876 Montana, Capt. Phillip Donlin's duty in the Great Sioux Wars strains his marriage as his wife, Celie, has an affair with Lt. Haywood. Overhearing their plans to flee, Donlin is heartbroken but continues his mission to warn General Custer of a massive Sioux buildup. Defying orders, he presses on, racing against time to reach Custer before disaster strikes.

programme.title: Dig Your Grave Friend... Sabata's Coming
programme.desc: Steve McGowan returns from the Civil War to find his father murdered by the ruthless landowner Miller. Seeking revenge, Steve joins forces with the bandit Pompero. Things take a turn when they capture Helen, Miller's fiancée. With the deadly gunslinger Sabata now hunting them, alliances are tested, and the fight for justice intensifies.

programme.title: Navajo
programme.desc: A young Navajo Indian boy is caught up in the conflict of cultures when he rejects the white man's school. Told in semi-documentary style.

programme.title: They Called Him Trinity
programme.desc: An ex-sheriff sets out to find the bandits who beat and murdered his sister.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: Make Mine Mink
programme.desc: A group of people lead by Major Rayne (Terry Thomas), hatch a plan to steal fur coats, sell them and give the money to charity. As a group, however, they are not particularly experienced in such matters.

programme.title: It's Not Cricket
programme.desc: Major Bright and Captain Early are planning to capture a fugitive Nazi who has stolen the famous Rothstein diamond and hidden it in a hollow cricket ball. As Bright and Early search for the Nazi, will they realise they have the valuable cricket ball?

programme.title: Conspiracy of Hearts
programme.desc: During World War Two, Italian nuns are caught helping children escape from German troops.

programme.title: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: Nigel Dennis is the suave publisher of the scandal magazine The Naked Truth. He is attempting to blackmail several well-known people. They in turn group together and plan his removal.

programme.title: YMCA Baseball Team
programme.desc: Korea's first baseball team wins games and the hearts and hopes of her people.

programme.title: When Romance Meets Destiny
programme.desc: Two brothers, Kwang-Sik and Kwang-Tae, have very different attitudes toward women. Kwang-Sik is extremely shy and can't say a word to a woman. But Kwang-Tae is a playboy who just sleeps around. One day, Kwang-Sik meets Yoon-Kyung for the first time in seven years and he tries to confess his feelings to her, in his own way. Similarly, Kwang-Tae meets Kyung-Jae during a marathon and he tries his own ways on her.At first Kwang-Sik still finds it very difficult to even talk to Yoon-Kyung and Kwang-Tae thinks of Kyung-Jae as yet another temporary conquest, but in each case something changes in the brothers. Will they be able to love this time?

programme.title: How to steal a dog
programme.desc: Ji-so, a young girl who doesn't have a house because of her bankrupted dad. In order to get money to buy a house she plan to steals wealthy people's dogs to earn reward money when she returns them.

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: A Brand New Life
programme.desc: Jin-hee aged 9 reluctantly enters an orphanage struggling with feelings of abandonment by her father.

programme.title: Love Lies
programme.desc: Two friends fall apart as they compete their love for music romance and the chance to become Joseon's voice.

programme.title: Nailed
programme.desc: Jae-gu and Sun-yeong a couple that runs an auto-shop off set off an chain of events headed for catastrophe.

programme.title: Hide-And-Never Seek
programme.desc: VJ Glow is the MC of the horror-based online channel. One day he stumbles upon a frightening video of mystery.

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: The adults lost the war and now the kids must save the world! Robots rule the streets and the people are locked in their homes. Stepping outside risks being vaporised by a hulking Sentry or picked off by a lethal Sniper.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: Above the Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world.

programme.title: Boneless
programme.desc: On a business trip to Venice, a couple offers a ride to a mysterious hitchhiker. A wrong turn at the worst possible time will lead the protagonists into the middle of an intergalactic war between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Christmas at Holly Lodge
programme.desc: Sophie is the proud owner of the perfect Christmas getaway destination. Will her blossoming relationship with a guest end when she discovers his ulterior motive for staying at Holly Lodge? (2017)

programme.title: Christmas in Evergreen
programme.desc: Allie is from the magical small-town of Evergreen. Will her wish for a romantic Christmas come true after a series of events seemingly transpire against her? Starring Ashley Williams. (2017)

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: (2017) Romance starring Lindy Booth. After a messy public break-up, a woman retreats to her uncle's ranch - where a run-in with a Hollywood actor sparks an unexpected connection.

programme.title: Christmas Truce
programme.desc: An American soldier and a Belgian woman fall in love during a brief holding truce amid the Battle of the Bulge, promising to reunite at the end of the war. Stars Craig Olejnik and Ali Liebert (2015)

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Waiting for you
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter realizes the pharaoh's tomb being empty except for a Roman coin means the treasure was looted to Rome but later probably transferred the the new, Byzantine capital, Constantinople.

programme.title: The Green Hornet: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A newspaper publisher and his Korean servant fight crime as vigilantes who pose as a notorious masked gangster and his aide.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.sub-title: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: When a corporate pharmaceutical sponsor is about to pull the plug on research, part-time adventurer Dr. Jack Byron re-awakens their interest with tales of the Borneo black orchid, said to produce a chemical that can keep a cell reproducing indefinitely. When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programme.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
programme.desc: A ruthless mercenary, Hammett (David Hasselhoff) and his team are on the hunt for a pair of giant snakes that have escaped and are on a mega-sized feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.sub-title: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: When a corporate pharmaceutical sponsor is about to pull the plug on research, part-time adventurer Dr. Jack Byron re-awakens their interest with tales of the Borneo black orchid, said to produce a chemical that can keep a cell reproducing indefinitely. When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: A divorced father and his eight-year-old son, spend a rather predictable weekend together, but when a valuable toolbox gets stolen, the search for the thieves will turn into a true family bonding.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: Clary Fray thinks she is just an ordinary teenager living in Brooklyn, but everything changes one night when in a downtown club she encounters the mysterious and charismatic Jace , and witnesses a shocking murder.

programme.title: A Perfect Plan
programme.desc: Four notorious thieves wake up in a fortified warehouse and are forced to commit an audacious diamond heist to win their freedom.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.
